title: JobTokenIdentifier and JobTokenSelector
description: The 'security/token' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains classes responsible for managing job tokens, which are crucial for secure job execution. The `JobTokenIdentifier.java` file defines a class that represents a job token identifier, including methods for token creation, reading, writing, and renewal. It extends `TokenIdentifier` and uses `Text` for job ID storage. The `JobTokenSelector.java` file implements a `TokenSelector` for job tokens, searching through a collection of tokens to find and return the first job token matching a specified service. Both classes rely on Hadoop's security token interfaces and utilize `Text` for service representation, demonstrating a clear implementation of the Strategy design pattern to select appropriate tokens based on their kind.

raw_response:
TITLE: JobTokenIdentifier and JobTokenSelector

DESCRIPTION:
The 'security/token' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains classes responsible for managing job tokens, which are crucial for secure job execution. The `JobTokenIdentifier.java` file defines a class that represents a job token identifier, including methods for token creation, reading, writing, and renewal. It extends `TokenIdentifier` and uses `Text` for job ID storage. The `JobTokenSelector.java` file implements a `TokenSelector` for job tokens, searching through a collection of tokens to find and return the first job token matching a specified service. Both classes rely on Hadoop's security token interfaces and utilize `Text` for service representation, demonstrating a clear implementation of the Strategy design pattern to select appropriate tokens based on their kind.
